feed.title: SAP Community - BW Business Explorer (SAP BEx)
feed.subtitle: BW Business Explorer (SAP BEx) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SID deletions-Renumbering
entry.content:
Hi Team,

WE have deleted unused SID's in BW on HANA system for some inobjects.

We wanted to renumber the SID's where SAP supporting only renumbering 3 millions a day which take lot of time for renumbering all SID's with its standard program. Do you any program/any other way where we can renumber all SID's at once.  Currently we have 700 million records but the NRIV number reaching 1.9 billion which need to renumber so that we will get more space for new SID's.

BW (SAP Business Warehouse)  

Thanks&Regards,

Anand

entry.title: Querry Convert KPI to Characteristics
entry.content:
Hi,

not Unuseual at all:
In a query I need to convert a KPI to characteristic, to be able to filter on it.

I used to do this quite a while ago but forgot how it was done.
Anybody out there got a refresher for me ?

For example: 
KPI Value of KPI YYY =  1  to a Characteristic XXX with  value = "YES"
KPI Value of KPI YYY = -1  to a Characteristic XXX with  value "NO"

Thank You !
Best Martin

entry.title: Calculation of group-wise Running Total of Key Figure in SAP BW
entry.content:
Hi community members,

I have been stuck on a problem in SAP BW for some time where I need to calculate the running total of transactions order by date for a particular bill at any given date. I have data for the date-wise transaction amount for every bill in each row in my key figures (columns), and the data for bill number and transaction date in each row as Characteristics. 

I have attached an example for reference. Any help in finding the solution would be appreciated.

Thank You.

entry.title: How to write "IF THEN ELSE" statement with BEX query Key Figure technical ID object in SAC
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to create a calculation in SAP analytics cloud on story level which is 

• IF Net Invoice Value is negative then “Credit memo”

My source is BEx query and I have a key figure in the BEx query i.e "Net Invoice Value" which I want to use in the calculated measure.

The technical id of Net Invoice Value in the BEX query is [00O2TKK8G8XRQO3VD5VBZC115]

I tried the following syntax while creating the calculated measure on a story level i.e

IF([00O2TKK8G8XRQO3VD5VBZC115] < 0, "Credit Memo", "")

but I am getting an error message below while writing this logic.

"Formula could not be computed: Object is unknown: 00O2TKK8G8XRQO3VD5VBZC115. Please complete or rewrite the formula".

I will appreciate if you let me know what is wrong with the formula and how to use BEx object in the SAC calculation which has technical ID associated with it.

Thank You very much in advance.

Regards

entry.title: Portal Runtime Error.
entry.content:
Hello everyone, My users are having this problem after the last bw update.

Portal runtime error

Exception while processing the request; send the exception ID to the portal administrator

Exception ID 07:49_15/01/25_0096_23493150

More details about this exception can be found in the log file.

Someone can give some advice how to fix or how to find this log exception file in SAP BW?

Users that have the the sap user different from the user windows network the portal ask for login and password they can login.

But users that have the user sap the same from windows network the portal return this error. I really hope someone can help me.

 

Thank you very much.

entry.title: BEx Callback to AfO Callback migration
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm currently dealing with a very old BEx workbook that has some VBA code in it. There is a Sub 

 

Public CallBack(ParamArray varname())
  'Currently this callback routine is only called for Grid Items
  'varname(0): BExExcelItem.DataProvider.Name
  'varname(1): BExExcelItem.Range
  'varname(2): BExExcelItem.Name
......
End Sub

 

that has been registered in the BEx Menu to be called after variables refresh.

Now I need to get this working with AfO... I figured out to register the callback as described here https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESSOBJECTS_ANALYSIS_OFFICE/ca9c58444d64420d99d6c136a3207632/f26f56246c9b1014bf2c9a7eb0e91070.html?locale=en-US&q=DataSources

However I can't access varname() anymore. Is there some kind of equivalent to this?

entry.title: SAP GUI / BWMT Bex Query Designer : Disable Release for External Access feature
entry.content:
Hello,

We are looking for guidance to disable "Allow External Access to this Query" under Release for External Access properties of Bex Query Designer. 

Disable Check Box : By OLE DB for OLAP

Currently, this feature is open for all users in our BW Landscape and we would like to enable this feature only for Developer. 

We searched SAP Support Knowledge, however could find any recommendations. 

Appreciate if you can guide us on how to disable this feature from SAP GUI to disable on screen or Authorization Object or User Exit , so that when users  tries to save, they are not Authorized for this Feature. 

Thank You

entry.title: BW Inventory Aging Report
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Could anyone suggest to implement BW inventory Aging buckets required to be calculated based on the stock. Early response would be helpful.

Regards,

Abhishek Jain

entry.title: Need a Scaling Factor column added either to a Characteristic or KF structure in BEx Query Designer
entry.content:
In BEx QD, is there a way to either add a free text field into the characteristic structure or maybe add a key figure that contains partial text? Our customer wants to have the scaling factor labels spelled out next to the goal amounts. As show below and attached. If not spelled out, they might settle for M/B next to the numbers. The scaling factor feature (at least in this version of the QD) seems to want to put it in the KF header as 1000000s or 1000000000s. We are on the 7.4 release of QD Revision 739. Any information about why this can or cannot be accomplished would be very helpful. Also, if you know it is possible in later versions of BW that might help as well. Also, we would like to do this without modifying the info providers if possible.

Thank you!

Chris

 

 1st Choice Solution*2nd Choice Solution**   
Area****GoalGoalGoals (hidden col.)Actuals% Actuals to Goal
      
Discretionary Support$123 Million$123M                    123,000,000$12,354,60010%
Future Needs  $321 Million$321M                    321,000,000$32,154,60010%
Operational Support     $1 Billion     $1B               1,000,000,000$225,460,00023%
Research     $2 Billion     $2B               2,000,000,000$825,460,00041%
Building            $200 Million$200 M                    200,000,000$20,254,60010%
Total                                    $3.64 Billion$3.64B               3,644,000,000$1,115,683,80031%
      
*      We would like to have different scaling factors possible for rows with the "Millions" and "Billions" labels spelled out. This could either be the separate scaling of a key figure column or, if possible, the insertion of a text field that cooresponds with the row characteristic nodes.
**     Same as the 1st choice but have "M" and "B" as the scaling indicators instead of being spelled out.
***   Goals (In case the goal is a text column this would be used for the % calculation but would be hidden)
**** This is a characteristic structure comprised of multiple characteristic selections along with formulas.

entry.title: Balance de 8 Columna
entry.content:
Hola amigos, alguien me puede orrientar con este error cuando intento generar un balance de 8 columnas en SAP b1...

 

ya el libro esta configurado pero me sale ese error

entry.title: BW Web Report Is not working in EDGE.
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm having problem in my bex web reports, 

The load in Chrome it is ok, but when i try to load the report in microsoft edge the loading never ends and the report is not showed. The problem is that my organization does not permit Chrome installation anymore.

I tried everythink in the configurations, clear cookies, add permitions in javascript.

Someone had this problem before can help me, thanks.

Follow the screenshot.

entry.title: SAC drill down or Hierarchies function for product dimesion LIVE connection
entry.content:
Hello,

I have one question, how can we use CDS Hierarchies for example to drill down on Dimensions? for example how to create level based  like  Region-Country-City drildown or like ( Year>Quarter>Month) 'Level based Hierarchy ?

I want to craete level based Hierarchies for  The field Product Hierarchy (MARA-PRDHA). I am working on LIVE connection. 

Any support would be appreciated.

I saw few articles, buit did not found the excat solution

I am attaching few links below for your reference, 

Hierarchies in CDS views - SAP Community

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/abap-cds-recursive-association-using-hierarchy/ba-p/13455674

https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_cp_index_htm/CLOUD/en-US/ABENCDS_F1_DEFINE_HIERARCHY.html

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/beginners-guide-for-cds-hierarchies-part-2/ba-p/13473914

 

SAC output should have drilldown on dimensions like below to represent each category or level separately and user should have choice to see level. Similarly like we have for Date (to see it on year month day)

entry.title: When I move to Quality system from Dev my BW Query OData service, it is moved "proforma".
entry.content:
Hello to all of you. The problem is as follows:

I develop OData service with all the artifacts based on Query. The tests are ok, and when I move to Quality system I see that in the service persists in /iwfnd/maint_service but the REG_SERVICE and REG_MODEL tables doesnt have the corresponding records. The service and its belonging model are missing.
For example the Model (XXXX_MDL) is available in table /IWBEP/I_MGW_OHT in the development system, but when moved it is missing in quality. When I execute the service in /iwfnd/gw_client, I got status code Error 500 - No service found for namespace /SAP/.....

entry.title: Executing OData over BW Query pass back an error 400 for a non mandatory variable
entry.content:
Hello to all of you!

When I am executing an OData service exposing BW Query I include all the variables - the non-mandatory I leave empty like X_0Material='', but about the mandatory one I pass a parameter like X_0Fiscper='001.2025'. Unfortunately for Calday's variable, which is optional it returns error - status code 400 and more precisely "Invalid key predicate type . Expected type is 'Edm.DateTime' ".
I tried with /Date('') and all the variances but it doesn't recognize it.

Every assistance is appreciated.
Thank you in advance!

entry.title: How to display custom Message in RSRT and AO until valid input is given
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have implemented BADI for customer exit variables - calling external program to implement form - endform.  I need to display a Message in RSRT and AO [Analysis for Office] until valid currency type value is given as input. It should allow to enter correct currency type value if wrong input is provided

In the called external called program in Form - endform - under i_step =3 , i have implemented the following code to display message. But I need to display my own custom message.

          TRY.
              IF lv_return_msg IS NOT INITIAL.
                RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_rs_error_with_message
*                  MESSAGE ID 'BRAIN' TYPE 'W' NUMBER '655' WITH 'Enter Currency Type --> 30 '.
                exporting
                  msgid           = 'BRAIN'
                  msgno           = '642'
                  msgty           = sy-msgty
                  attribute_msgv1 = 'Currency Type.'.
              ENDIF. " lv_return_msg IS NOT INITIAL.
            CATCH cx_rs_error_with_message.
              MESSAGE ID 'BRAIN' TYPE 'W' NUMBER '642' WITH ' Currency Type.'.
          ENDTRY.

Please suggest me , is there any class available to display message (in both RSRT and AO) until valid currency type value is provided.

Thanks
kv

entry.title: HOW TO ADD NEW FIELD IN EXISTED CUBE AT TRANSFORMATION LEVEL AND FILL WITH LOOK UP DSO
entry.content:
Hi experts 

please help me on this ,

i have new development requirement. there is an existed flow as DS --DSO1-DSO2-INFOCUBE in sap bw i have to add new field to INFOCUBE directly (no mapping in transoformation level)and which should get data from some other dso say DSO3 with lookup method(ex say: 0DOC_DATE ) using matching key fields and apply and move these changes to development to quality please explain me the step by step approach with example if possible

Thanks in Advance..

entry.title: Frage zu Note 3458956: Integration Leistungsgruppen in BW-Healthcare-Content
entry.content:
Die Note 3458956 beschreibt die Integration der Leistungsgruppen für die Erstellung des §21-Datensatzes:

Mit den Support Packages im März 2025 wurden Funktionen/Anpassungen zur Verfügung gestellt, damit

  • die Stammdaten der Leistungsgruppen im System hinterlegt werden können,
  • das Programm RNAP21K01 dazu in der Lage ist, die beiden neuen Dateien KRANKENHAUSSTRUKTUR_LEISTUNGSGRUPPEN und ARZTQUALIFIKATION_LEISTUNGSGRUPPEN erstellen zu können und
  • das Programm RNAP21F01 dazu in der Lage ist, in der Datei FALL die Spalten LG-Bezug und Leistungsgruppe erstellen zu können.

Für uns ergeben sich die Frage: Wird es eine Integration der Leistungsgruppen in den BW-Healthcare-Content geben? Wann wird damit zu rechnen sein?

entry.title: PC failed recovery steps
entry.content:
Hi experts ,

i have been facing the DSO Failed in process chain with space issue . while checking its getting data from another DSO, AS shown in below flow from that same source dso its loading to another two flows , among those one flow completed till cube level, another OHD is loading ,now how can i recover the below failed (RED). Explain me or please provide me the relevant source to recovery this scenario.

Thanks in advance,

VIJAY

entry.title: Enhance Standard CDS view I_AugmentedPhysInvtryDocItem for Fiori- Physical Inventory Analysis
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have a requirement to add custom movement types to an existing fiori app - Physical Inventory Analysis that displays only 701 and 702 at the moment.

This App uses BEx query with data source I_PhysInvtryCube, this CDS view has another CDS view as data source I_AugmentedPhysInvtryDocItem.

Inside this CDS view, I found a CASE statement that restricts the movement types, now I want to change this CASE statement, can you help me how to achieve this.

I am looking at Custom Fields and Logic app to enhance this CDS view, but unable to find the business context. Is there a way to enhance the logic of this CDS view without creating a NEW CDS view.

Appreciate any help!

@ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_GoodsMovementType'

cast((case when Quantity > BookQtyBfrCountInMatlBaseUnit and PhysicalInventoryItemIsCounted = 'X'

then _AdjmtPostingMovementType.PhysInvtryIncreasingQtyMvtType

else case when Quantity < BookQtyBfrCountInMatlBaseUnit and PhysicalInventoryItemIsCounted = 'X'

then _AdjmtPostingMovementType.PhysInvtryDecreasingQtyMvtType

else ''

end

end) as pi_bwart preserving type) as GoodsMovementType,

entry.title: How to display custom Message in RSRT and AO until valid input is given
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have implemented BADI for customer exit variables - calling external program to implement form - endform. I need to display a Message in RSRT and AO [Analysis for Office] until valid currency type value is given as input. It should allow to enter correct currency type value if wrong input is provided

In the called external called program in Form - endform - under i_step =3 , i have implemented the following code to display message. But I need to display my own custom message.

TRY.
IF lv_return_msg IS NOT INITIAL.
RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_rs_error_with_message
* MESSAGE ID 'BRAIN' TYPE 'W' NUMBER '655' WITH 'Enter Currency Type --> 30 '.
exporting
msgid = 'BRAIN'
msgno = '642'
msgty = sy-msgty
attribute_msgv1 = 'Currency Type.'.
ENDIF. " lv_return_msg IS NOT INITIAL.
CATCH cx_rs_error_with_message.
MESSAGE ID 'BRAIN' TYPE 'W' NUMBER '642' WITH ' Currency Type.'.
ENDTRY.

Please suggest me , is there any class available to display message (in both RSRT and AO) until valid currency type value is provided.

Thanks
kv
